_meta.source: WizardryIMaps.pdf by Rob Craig (2010) + tk421.net cross-reference
notes: Cells with all-open walls and no feature are omitted; the loader infers default 'open' for missing walls and outer-edge 'wall' for x<0 or x>19 or y<0 or y>19.
B1F-B4F transcription targets high accuracy; B5F-B10F walls re-transcribed in pass 2 via automated overlay verified against source PNGs.
Numbered markers (1, 1', 2, etc) correspond to walkthrough references on the source map and are recorded as feature='marker' with label string.
Shaded 'Dark' zones on the original PDF map are recorded as dark:true.

cells._note: Murphy's Ghost grinding spot per walkthrough (5N,13E)

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 3
floors._layout_note: Level 3 is a grid of small isolated rooms with many one-way doors; navigation is puzzle-like. Markers P/T are pits and a spinner in the central cluster.

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 4
floors._layout_note: Level 4 has the multi-stop elevator and the central key-item room (Blue Ribbon area).

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 5
floors._layout_note: Level 5 features a spinner (T) at (4,5) and the down-stair at (12,7) leading to Level 6.

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 6
floors._layout_note: Level 6 has multiple pits (P), elevator (E) at (8,0), markers 1', 2', 1 scattered. Mostly dark zones in lower half.

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 7
floors._layout_note: Level 7 is the symmetrical 'Castle' level with concentric rooms, U-stair in center area, D-stair on east side, four pits (P) in lower-left, marker 1 in center.

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 8
floors._layout_note: Level 8 is the densest level with many numbered teleporter pairs (1/1', 2/2', ... up to 12/12'). Each unprimed/primed pair is a one-way warp. U-stair and stairs_down embedded in central numbered cluster.

floors.name: Proving Grounds Level 9
floors._layout_note: Level 9 is the maze-of-walls level with the chute to Werdna's Domain at (8,2). Mostly solid wall with narrow corridors looping around the perimeter.

floors.name: Werdna's Domain
floors._layout_note: Werdna's lair. Entry via chute (S) at (6,0). Werdna and vampire allies wait in central room. Elevator (E) at (10,0) is the only way out.
